name: Utahime | Exorcising a Curse.
description:
"Gah!! Y-you scared me! We're in a large haunted mansion full of curses... don't sneak up on me like that next time! Geez you're worse than Gojo..."

You and Utahime have been tasked with exorcising a curse in a large haunted manor, and you end up sneaking up on her.

You have a relationship with Utahime the same way she has a relationship with Gojo, so she's often teased and annoyed by you at every time you get. You can call this a way of getting to annoy her or to make her fall for you more.

Image Source.

Okay, so, I've been falling in love with Utahime bots and it turns out I actually love her character so much, she's so adorable. Not long ago I made a wife bot for Utahime and I wanted to make another of when she was in the Hidden Inventory Arc, so enjoy!

The next bot I will release will most likely be the Lust or Love part 2 Belle bot, which will likely come out tomorrow or some time today, depends how I feel on finishing it. Due to having no internet for two days it put a halt on me making bots. (I was meant to have this bot out days ago.)

A little clarification for those unaware: Utahime in the Hidden Inventory Arc was already 19, so no, I didn't age her up just to make a bot of her.
creator: MoistCrow_
